message:
fix(web): fix bugs found in UI/UX code review

- Fix Modal.tsx cleanup: Early return when not open instead of
  checking open in cleanup function (was preventing proper cleanup)
- Fix useDataTable: Change useMemo to useEffect for side-effect code
  that updates pagination state
- Fix CSS: Add display:none for data-table__cards on desktop
  (cards were showing alongside table)
- Remove duplicate responsive media query blocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
